name: 34_Customer_Segmentation_KMeans_CustomerSegmentation_ML
query: Nahitaji kuunda mfumo wa kugawanya wateja kwa kutumia algoriti ya K-means clustering na seti ya data ya Kaggle Customer Segmentation. Anza kwa kusawazisha data katika `src/data_loader.py`, kisha tumia njia ya elbow kubaini idadi bora ya makundi na uhifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`. Tekeleza algoriti ya K-means katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi vituo vya makundi katika `results/metrics/cluster_centers.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya kugawanya kwa kutumia seaborn na uhifadhi mchoro kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`. Unda dashibodi ya Dash inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" inatumika, ikijumuisha upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Njia ya elbow inatumika kubaini idadi bora ya makundi. Tafadhali hifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`.
Algoriti ya K-means clustering inatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Kugawanya kwa wateja kunaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`.
Dashibodi ya mwingiliano inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash".

preferences.criteria: Mchoro wa elbow unaonyesha wazi jinsi idadi bora ya makundi inavyobainishwa.
Mfumo unadhibiti vizuri uzinduzi na kumalizika kwa dashibodi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" inatumika, ikijumuisha upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual loading or preparation of the "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" dataset. Instead, it contains only a placeholder `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no real data loading logic, no file reading, no pandas/CSV operations, and no actual connection to any Kaggle dataset. The file is explicitly labeled as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — meaning it is a stub, not a functional implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual data standardization implementation. The file is a minimal placeholder that only defines requirement criteria strings and stub functions (`load_dataset()` and `build_transforms()`). There is no real standardization code such as `StandardScaler`, `MinMaxScaler`, or any normalization logic applied to actual data. The `build_transforms()` function merely returns a list of strings `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` without any functional implementation. No actual dataset is loaded or standardized.

judge_stats.criteria: Njia ya elbow inatumika kubaini idadi bora ya makundi. Tafadhali hifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa faili `results/figures/elbow.jpg` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, hakuna ushahidi wa utekelezaji wa njia ya elbow. Trajectory inaonyesha wazi kwamba hakuna hatua zilizorekodiwa za kuhesabu thamani za inertia/WCSS, kupanga grafu ya elbow, au kuhifadhi faili hiyo. Zaidi ya hayo, jaribio la kusoma faili `elbow.jpg` lilisababisha hitilafu ("Could not process image"), ikimaanisha faili hiyo labda iko tupu, imeharibiwa, au haikuzalishwa ipasavyo na msimbo wa elbow method. Msimbo katika `src/model.py` haujathibitishwa kuwa unatekeleza njia ya elbow.

judge_stats.criteria: Algoriti ya K-means clustering inatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement the K-means clustering algorithm. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder ("model placeholder"). There is no actual K-means implementation — no use of `sklearn.cluster.KMeans`, no custom K-means logic, no data fitting, no cluster assignment, and no meaningful ML code whatsoever.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/cluster_centers.txt` exists in the project structure, but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual cluster centers data. This indicates that the K-Means model was not properly trained and the real cluster centers were never computed or saved to this file.

judge_stats.criteria: Kugawanya kwa wateja kunaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa faili `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, hakuna ushahidi wa kutosha kwamba imeundwa kwa kutumia maktaba ya **seaborn**. Zaidi ya hayo, jaribio la kusoma faili hilo lilirudisha hitilafu ya mfumo (`Error reading image file`), maana yake maudhui ya picha hayawezi kuthibitishwa. Trajekta pia inaonyesha kwamba hakuna hatua zilizorekodiwa zinazohusiana na matumizi ya `seaborn` au uundaji wa mchoro huu. Kwa hivyo, kigezo hiki hakijatimizwa kikamilifu.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya mwingiliano inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash".

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Hakuna ushahidi wowote wa uundaji wa dashibodi ya mwingiliano kwa kutumia "Dash". Muundo wa mradi unaonyesha faili mbili tu (`data_loader.py` na `model.py`) ambazo zote ni "minimal semantic implementation placeholders" bila utekelezaji wa kweli. Hakuna faili kama `app.py`, `dashboard.py`, au faili nyingine yoyote inayohusiana na Dash. Zaidi ya hayo, faili zilizopo hazina uagizaji wa maktaba ya Dash, callbacks, layouts, au vipengele vya mwingiliano. Trajekta pia inathibitisha kwamba hakuna hatua zilizorekodiwa za uundaji wa dashibodi ya Dash.
